turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinions of the Court in two cases will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: JUSTICE WHITE
turns.text: The first of these cases is 89-1918, McCormick against the United States. For the reasons stated in an opinion on file with the Clerk, we reverse the judgment of the Court of Appeals for the Fourth Circuit. Justice Scalia has filed a concurring opinion; Justice Stevens had filed a dissenting opinion, and Justices Blackmun and O'Connor have joined that dissent.
